title: 全球同性婚姻立法进展：荷兰开创先河25周年
original_title: Key facts about same-sex marriage around the world, 25 years after the Netherlands legalized it
summary_en: Twenty-five years after the first nationally recognized same-sex marriages, nearly 40 places now allow them. But their prevalence varies, as do public attitudes.
title_cn: 全球同性婚姻立法进展：荷兰开创先河25周年

title: 多数美国民众反对对伊朗采取军事行动
original_title: Americans Broadly Disapprove of U.S. Military Action in Iran
summary_en: Most Americans say striking Iran was the wrong decision and disapprove of Trump's handling of the conflict, with stark partisan divides.
title_cn: 多数美国民众反对对伊朗采取军事行动

title: 美国建国250周年：过去50年的社会变迁
original_title: The United States at 250: How the Country Has Changed in the Past 50 Years
summary_en: As America turns 250, explore how demographics, work, family and economics have shifted since 1976, based on 50 years of Census data.
title_cn: 美国建国250周年：过去50年的社会变迁

title: 美国民众对种族多元化的态度调查
original_title: How Americans view racial diversity ahead of the country's 250th anniversary
summary_en: 75% of U.S. adults see diversity as a good thing for the country, but Democrats and Republicans differ sharply on how diversity impacts the country's culture.
title_cn: 美国民众对种族多元化的态度调查

title: 美国民众突发新闻获取渠道调查
original_title: Where do Americans turn first for information about breaking news?
summary_en: When a breaking news event happens, 36% of U.S. adults say they typically turn first to their preferred news organization to get more information.
title_cn: 美国民众突发新闻获取渠道调查

title: 美国民众对安乐死道德观念调查
original_title: About 6 in 10 Americans don't have moral objections to medical aid in dying
summary_en: Republicans are twice as likely as Democrats to call physician-assisted death morally wrong (48% vs. 23%).
title_cn: 美国民众对安乐死道德观念调查

title: 美国黑人移民群体特征研究
original_title: Key findings about Black immigrants in the U.S.
summary_en: The U.S. Black immigrant population has more than doubled since 2000, reaching 5.6 million in 2024 and now making up 11.4% of the total Black population.
title_cn: 美国黑人移民群体特征研究

title: 美国民众居住偏好调查：大房子还是便利设施
original_title: Majority of Americans prefer spread-out communities with big houses
summary_en: 55% of Americans say they would prefer to live in a community where houses are larger and farther away from amenities – compared to 44% who say the opposite.
title_cn: 美国民众居住偏好调查：大房子还是便利设施

title: 美国人的道德观念调查
summary_en: Nine-in-ten Americans say having an affair is wrong. Republicans and Democrats differ sharply on the morality of abortion and homosexuality.
title_cn: 美国人的道德观念调查
